creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)
% pkg iinfo meld
meld-3.22.0,1

% python --version
python: Command not found.

% python3.9 --version                                                                        
Python 3.9.16

% uname -aKU
FreeBSD xxxx 13.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE releng/13.2-n254617-525ecfdad597 GENERIC amd64 1302001 130200

It can be caused by some other dependencies but I don't know how to debug it as I am not a developer.
